info.title: UCP Payment Authentication Action Embedded Protocol
info.description: Embedded notifications for standard UCP payment authentication Action surfaces. A Platform loads an Action config URL in an isolated browser-capable surface. The surface sends JSON-RPC 2.0 notifications through postMessage, or an equivalent native bridge, to report that the Platform-facing interaction completed or cannot continue. These notifications are advisory: the Business remains authoritative for payment and Checkout outcomes.

methods.name: action.done
methods.description: The loaded surface notifies the Platform that its scoped interaction is done. This notification does not assert device-data collection, authentication, or payment success. The Business reflects the authoritative outcome in a later Checkout response.

schema.description: ID of the outstanding Action occurrence represented by this surface.

methods.name: action.error
methods.summary: Payment authentication Action surface cannot continue
methods.description: The loaded surface notifies the Platform of a surface-level failure. This notification is not a payment authorization or authentication result. The Platform follows the fallback defined by the active payment authentication extension and negotiated payment handler.

schema.description: ID of the outstanding Action occurrence represented by this surface.
Surface-level failure details. Domain outcomes remain owned by the Business and payment provider.
